title: Span
description: Represents a single operation within a trace. Spans have a name, start and end time, and attributes describing the operation.

traceId.description: The trace identifier, a 32-character hex string shared by all spans in the same trace.

spanId.description: The span identifier, a 16-character hex string unique to this span.

parentSpanId.description: The span identifier of the parent span. Empty for root spans.

name.description: A descriptive name for the operation (e.g., HTTP GET /api/users).

kind.description: The span kind indicating the relationship between the span and its parent. 0=Unspecified, 1=Internal, 2=Server, 3=Client, 4=Producer, 5=Consumer.

startTimeUnixNano.description: The start time of the span in nanoseconds since Unix epoch.

endTimeUnixNano.description: The end time of the span in nanoseconds since Unix epoch.

attributes.description: Key-value attributes describing the span's operation.

status.description: The status of the span operation.

events.description: Time-stamped events that occurred during the span.

timeUnixNano.description: The event time in nanoseconds since Unix epoch.
